title.en: The race that appeared in Ye Tian's sight was t...

content.en:
"Giants!"

The race that appeared in Ye Tian's sight was the Giant Clan.

The Giants are also one of the great races in the universe, and their size is so large that even the babies of the Giants are ten meters tall, and the adult Giants can grow to a hundred meters tall.

Moreover, the giant clan has a magical power that can become bigger, and it is rumored that after the strong man of the giant clan becomes bigger, he can swallow the sun and the moon in his mouth and hold the galaxy in his hand, which is extremely terrifying.

Ye Tian had only heard of the Giant Clan before, but he had never seen the real Giant Clan.

The Giant Race is one of the few cosmic races that has a good relationship with the Terran race, and it is rumored that there is a Giant Clan and a Terran marriage, giving birth to a human with the blood of the Giant.

Seeing the arrival of the Giant Clan, several masters of the Terran Race greeted him and chatted with the Giants Clan's masters.

Subsequently, one race after another came here, many of which Ye Tian had never even heard of.

In the blink of an eye, a month has passed.

Then.

Xuanyuan Juggernaut said: "This time you enter the ruins world mainly pay attention to a few aspects, whether it is an emperor-level, god-level, true god-level or a great god-level highness, first of all, you must pay attention to the highnesses of the two universe super clans, ordinary highnesses and pinnacle-level highnesses Once you meet these two super clan highnesses, flee directly! Don't fight each other, otherwise the probability of falling is as high as ninety percent, and Henggu-level highnesses, if you meet these two super highnesses, do what you can." You may have heard of these two races, that is, the Protoss and the Demon Race! They are the real Protoss and the Demon Race, not the gods and demons created by some cults within our human race. "

"Protoss!

Ye Tian's face was also solemn.

There are not many records about the gods and demons in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and it seems that he is afraid of causing panic, and as an Eternal Highness, he can find out a little bit of simple information about the gods and demons, but he doesn't know much.

He knew that the Protoss and the Demon Race had appeared since the beginning of the universe, and there were no Terrans at that time.

The Protoss and the Demon Race used to be the two overlords of the entire universe, dominating most of the territory of the entire universe, and in the long years, the other cosmic races rose one by one, and the Protoss and the Demon Race continued to fight, giving other races the opportunity to rise.

But even though there are more big races in the universe, the god race and the demon race are still the two most powerful races, called super races.

A single clan is not an opponent of the Protoss or the Demon Race at all, and many of the major clans in the universe are basically united to compete with the Protoss and the Demon Race.

Coupled with the mutual containment between the gods and demons, there is room for other races to live.

And the development of all races in the universe to the present, there are many supreme level existences in the universe races, and it is not easy to destroy a universe race, and the era of ten thousand races is basically fixed.

Unless a certain clan has an existence beyond the supreme level, it will basically not change the current situation.

The Protoss and the Demon are the super clans of the universe, and their Highnesses of the Protoss and the Highnesses of the Demon are also very powerful, because the physique of the Protoss is very strong, the talent is also very good, and the Protoss has the most powerful divine inheritance and the best resources.

Therefore, it is not difficult for His Highness of the Protoss to grow to the peak level of the Son of the Universe, and it is even very easy to cultivate a Constant-level Highness.

Moreover, the Protoss is rich and rich, even if it is a pinnacle-level son of the universe, he has a lot of hole cards on his body, and if the pinnacle-level son of the human race meets the pinnacle-level son of the Protoss, there is a great possibility of being killed.

Because of this, the Xuanyuan Lord reminded these highnesses of the human race to try not to fight with the highnesses of the gods and demons, which was also to avoid heavy casualties.

Of course.

If he has the confidence to kill His Highness of the Protoss or the Demon Race, the Xuanyuan Lord naturally hopes that His Highness the Human Race will kill him, which can also bring losses to the Protoss or the Demon Race and inhibit the development of the Protoss.

In addition to the gods and demons, there are also some races to pay attention to, such as the Golden Clan, the Sea Clan, the King Kong Clan, the Blood Clan, the Angel Clan, and so on.

These races are all large races of the universe, and they do not have a very good relationship with the human race.

Master Xuanyuan reminded him a little, so he didn't say much.

In fact, when it comes to the world of ruins, even the Terrans are not necessarily harmonious, and in case they encounter some amazing chances, the possibility of fighting each other is not impossible.

And some friendly races will also stab you at critical times.

So, when entering the world of ruins, you must be vigilant against everyone.

A few more months passed, and the rest of the races were basically all in place.

That's when it happened.

Majestic figures suddenly enveloped this void, and the powerful aura even stopped the black hole in the center of the universe.

The Xuanyuan masters used their own breath to protect Ye Tian and the other highnesses, so that these highnesses would not be affected by this terrifying aura.

"Supreme!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

This majestic figure must be the Supreme, and only the Supreme has such a majestic power, as if he can destroy the Star Domain with one hand.

It's a pity that these supremes are too far away, and Ye Tian can't use the copy talent to check their talents, and he doesn't even know where their bodies are.

This majestic figure is obviously just a radiation of power, not a real body.

"Let's get started!"

A voice resounded through the void, not in the language of the Terrans, but in the language of God.

However, everyone can understand the meaning of this divine word.

"This person who speaks should be a supreme of the Protoss!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Soon.

One by one, the Supreme made a move, and one after another huge palms appeared, each palm seemed to be larger than a river system, and all of them acted on the huge black hole.

Click!!

The black hole was torn apart by the power of the Supremes, and these passages eventually turned into four passages, each corresponding to a relic world region.

"Definitely!"

"Definitely!"

"Definitely!"

The voices of the Supremes resounded through this void, and for a moment the laws collapsed, the black hole stopped functioning, and everything came to a standstill.

"Get ready, I'll send you in. Once inside, you will appear somewhere in the ruins, so be careful when you go in. "

After the masters reminded them, they divided the highnesses of the human race into four groups and sent them into the black hole.

Ye Tian didn't have time to react at all, and he couldn't even see the surrounding scene.

The power of the Domination sent him into a black hole that devoured light, consciousness, and perception.

He only felt that there was a darkness and nothingness around him, and even his thoughts were almost frozen.

I don't know how long it took, Ye Tian suddenly regained consciousness, and a light appeared in front of him.

Trample!!!

Ye Tian sensed that his feet were on the ground, and when he took a closer look, he found that he appeared on a large land.

It was a small hillside, and he was standing on top of it.

For the first time, Ye Tian restrained his breath and immediately observed the surrounding situation.

"What a rich Chaos Vitality!"

Ye Tian was suddenly surprised.

The Chaos Vitality here didn't seem to be inferior to the Chaos Vitality on the first layer of the Chaos Tower, although it couldn't help him hit the sixth layer of the Chaos Refining Technique, but it could refine his cultivation.

Moreover, this is obviously an ordinary place, with such a concentration of Chaos Yuan Qi, it must have some cultivation treasures, which are not weaker than the second layer of the Chaos Tower, or even better than the second layer of the Chaos Tower.

If he could keep cultivating here, even if he didn't have any chance, Ye Tian would be sure to hit the sixth layer of the Chaos Refining Technique, and his strength would skyrocket.

In addition to the fact that the chaotic vitality is very strong, the space here is also extremely stable, and the suppression of heaven and earth is also very large.

Ye Tian is the son of the universe in the universe, and he has gotten rid of the pressure of heaven and earth, but here he feels the familiar suppression of heaven and earth, and with such suppression of heaven and earth, it is difficult for him to cause huge damage here.

Ye Tian squatted down, picked up a stone, and gently pinched it with his hand, and the stone cracked.

"What a sturdy stone!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised, with his physical strength, even a piece of 10,000-year-old dark iron would be crushed by him, and this ordinary stone was only cracked, not shattered, which showed how strong it was.

"It's worthy of a relic world that can escape the Great Destruction of the Universe, nothing here is comparable to the outside world!" Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.

He looked into the distance, and saw that the land in the distance was full of cracks, and it was obvious that this ruinous world had also been destroyed.

The world is huge, and although it is divided into four parts, the size of each part is still unimaginable.

But this time, there are many highnesses who have entered the world of ruins, and the chances of meeting each other are still very high.

"According to Master Xuanyuan, the most precious thing in the ruin world is the inheritance of the previous universe. When the last universe was about to collapse, many forces knew that there was no way to avoid the collapse of the universe, so they put some treasures or inheritances in this world, hoping to pass them on. Even if this relic world has been opened many times, there are still some inheritances, as long as one inheritance is obtained, it is enough to make a race's heritage soar, and it is even expected that a race will develop into a cosmic race. "

Ye Tian also wanted to obtain that kind of inheritance, even if it was useless to him, he could also hand it over to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race in exchange for some precious treasures and opportunities.

Ye Tian used his divine sense to probe the surroundings and found that there were no good things here.

Immediately, Ye Tian also flew at a slow speed, paying attention to the surrounding situation, in case a Son of the Universe secretly attacked him.

Not long after flying, Ye Tian sensed a very strong fluctuation of chaotic ability, completely overshadowing the chaotic vitality of this world itself.

"There's a Chaos Treasure there!"

Ye Tian's heart moved.

He was very interested in the Chaos Treasure, and the Chaos Treasure that could be born here must also be very precious.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew over quickly, in case the other highnesses took away the treasure.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian came to his destination.
